nasb.text: To the rest of the Levites, the sons of Merari, were given, from the tribe of Zebulun: Rimmono with its pasture lands, Tabor with its pasture lands;

esv.text: To the rest of the Merarites were allotted out of the tribe of Zebulun: Rimmono with its pasturelands, Tabor with its pasturelands,

cnv.text: 又從西布倫支派中，把臨摩挪和屬於臨摩挪的草場，他泊和屬於他泊的草場，給了米拉利其餘的子孫。

ccb.text: 米拉利族的人从西布伦支派得到了临摩挪和他泊城及其周围的草场；
